ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation being performed */,
  "matrix_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the matrix format used */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the matrices (e.g., float, double) */,
  "m_size" INTEGER /* Number of rows in the matrix */,
  "n_size" INTEGER /* Number of columns in the matrix */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time of the operation in seconds */,
  "performance_flops" REAL /* Performance in gigaflops (GFLOPS) */,
  "memory_bandwidth" REAL /* Memory bandwidth in gigabytes per second (GB/s) */,
  "non_zero_elements" INTEGER /* Number of non-zero elements in the matrix */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for the operation */,
  "optimization_flags" TEXT /* Flags or settings used to optimize the operation */,
  "parallelism_level" INTEGER /* Level of parallelism used during the operation */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Maximum memory usage during the operation in gigabytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_matrix_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("matrix_format_id") REFERENCES matrix_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation (e.g., sm_div) */,
  "operation_description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "algorithm_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the algorithm (e.g., O(n^2), O(n log n)) */,
  "parallelizable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the operation is parallelizable */,
  "expected_flops" REAL /* Expected FLOPS for the operation, based on theoretical calculations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matrix_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matrix format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the matrix format (e.g., CRS, COO) */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the matrix format */,
  "storage_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the storage format in terms of space used */,
  "access_pattern" TEXT /* Typical access pattern for the format (e.g., row-major, column-major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., float, double) */,
  "data_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the data type in bits */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of values that can be represented by the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "cpu_model" TEXT /* CPU model used */,
  "gpu_model" TEXT /* GPU model used */,
  "memory_size" TEXT /* Total memory size */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  "compiler_version" TEXT /* Compiler version */,
  "gpu_memory" TEXT /* Total GPU memory available */,
  "network_bandwidth" TEXT /* Network bandwidth if the system is distributed */,
  "cache_size" TEXT /* Size of the CPU cache */,
  "parallelism_support" INTEGER /* Whether the configuration supports parallelism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric being tested */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the system configuration used */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the test run was performed */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the test run */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was run */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the test run in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numerical level of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the metric */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
